reason: Successfully verified that the agent can open a browser, navigate to https://example.com, retrieve the page title "Example Domain", and report back the result.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with "Gamut" title, showing sidebar with agent list
Found and clicked on "QA-20260624-202327-7abs" agent in sidebar — Agent page loaded successfully, showing message input field and agent settings
Clicked on message input field — Input field became focused and active
Typed message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." — Message appeared in input field correctly
Clicked "Send message" button — Message was sent, session created with title "Browser Page Title Lookup", agent status changed to "working"
Waited for agent response (up to 3 minutes) — Agent completed processing in 17 seconds, "Working..." indicator disappeared
Verified response mentions "Example Domain" — Response clearly shows:
Took screenshot of final response — Screenshot saved showing complete agent interaction and response with multiple mentions of "Example Domain"
